debug_info.goal:
case h
a : Type
p : a → Bool
sl : Chapter3.SymList a
lhs rhs : List a
ok :
  (lhs.isEmpty = true → rhs.isEmpty = true ∨ rhs.length = 1) ∧
    (rhs.isEmpty = true → lhs.isEmpty = true ∨ lhs.length = 1)
⊢ dropWhile p (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) =
    Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.dropWhileSL a p (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok))

failed_attempts:
induction' sl using SymList.rec on sl with
  | mk xs ys h =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, fromSL]
    split_ifs with h1 h2 <;> simp_all [dropWhile]
    <;> try { rfl }
    <;> apply congrArg
    <;> apply this
    <;> simp_all [length_tail_lt_length]

induction' sl using SymList.rec on sl with
  | mk xs ys h =>
    simp [dropWhileSL, fromSL]
    split_ifs with h1 h2 <;> simp_all [dropWhile]
    <;> try { rfl }
    <;> apply this

  <;> split_ifs <;> simp_all [dropWhileSL, fromSL]
  <;> try apply IH
  <;> simp_all [length_tail_lt_length]

induction' sl using SymList.recOn with lhs rhs ok IH <;> simp_all [dropWhileSL, fromSL]
  <;> split_ifs <;> simp_all [dropWhile]
